title: The Effects of Social Learning, Imitation and Social Pressures on Bacillus thuringiensis Cotton Technology Adoption Decisions in India
abstract:
The data for this working paper were gathered in India during August 2007-November 2008 in
collaboration with the International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics (ICRISAT)
in Patancheru, Andhra Pradesh, India. This research is funded through a combination of grants: a
National Science Foundation Doctoral Dissertation Research Improvement Grant, an American
Agricultural Economics Association McCorkle Fellowship, a Mario Einaudi Center for International
Studies International Research Travel Grant, a Graduate School Research Travel Grant and an
International Student and Scholar Office Grant.
